---
title: "Compile Decoy Intron Retention Data"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r load-libraries}
library(data.table)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
```

## Load BED File

```{r load-bed}
cat("Loading BED file...\n")
bed_data <- fread("../data/DecoysControlsUniqueIDsforRecount_filtered_maxent_updated.bed",
  col.names = c("chr", "start", "end", "decoyID", "SpliceAI_score", "strand", "MaxEnt_decoy", "Distance from 5'SS (nt)", "MaxEnt_canonical", "phastCons", "phastCons100way")
)

# Convert phastCons to numeric (handle "NA" strings)
bed_data$phastCons <- as.numeric(ifelse(bed_data$phastCons == "NA", NA, bed_data$phastCons))
bed_data$phastCons100way <- as.numeric(ifelse(bed_data$phastCons100way == "NA", NA, bed_data$phastCons100way))

cat("  BED data:", nrow(bed_data), "decoy sites\n")
cat("  Columns:", paste(colnames(bed_data), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("  SpliceAI scores (not -1):", sum(!is.na(bed_data$SpliceAI_score) & bed_data$SpliceAI_score != -1), "\n")
cat("  Distance from 5'SS values (not -1):", sum(!is.na(bed_data$`Distance from 5'SS (nt)`) & bed_data$`Distance from 5'SS (nt)` != -1), "\n")
cat("  MaxEnt decoy scores (non-NA):", sum(!is.na(bed_data$MaxEnt_decoy)), "\n")
cat("  MaxEnt canonical scores (non-NA):", sum(!is.na(bed_data$MaxEnt_canonical)), "\n")
cat("  phastCons (470-way) scores (non-NA):", sum(!is.na(bed_data$phastCons)), "\n")
if (sum(!is.na(bed_data$phastCons)) > 0) {
  cat("  phastCons (470-way) mean:", round(mean(bed_data$phastCons, na.rm = TRUE), 6), "\n")
  cat("  phastCons (470-way) range:", round(min(bed_data$phastCons, na.rm = TRUE), 6), "-", round(max(bed_data$phastCons, na.rm = TRUE), 6), "\n")
}
cat("  phastCons100way scores (non-NA):", sum(!is.na(bed_data$phastCons100way)), "\n")
if (sum(!is.na(bed_data$phastCons100way)) > 0) {
  cat("  phastCons100way mean:", round(mean(bed_data$phastCons100way, na.rm = TRUE), 6), "\n")
  cat("  phastCons100way range:", round(min(bed_data$phastCons100way, na.rm = TRUE), 6), "-", round(max(bed_data$phastCons100way, na.rm = TRUE), 6), "\n")
}
```

## Load Intron Retention Predictions

```{r load-intron-retention}
cat("\nLoading Intron Retention Predictions...\n")
intron_data <- fread("../data/IntronRetentionPredictionsAnnotated13082025.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

cat("  Intron Retention data:", nrow(intron_data), "rows x", ncol(intron_data), "columns\n")
cat("  Columns:", paste(colnames(intron_data), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Check for existing coordinate columns and standardize to chr, start, end
if ("chrom" %in% colnames(intron_data) && "start" %in% colnames(intron_data) && "end" %in% colnames(intron_data)) {
  # If chrom, start, end already exist, use them directly
  cat("  Using existing chrom, start, end columns for coordinates\n")
  setnames(intron_data, "chrom", "chr")
  # Remove rows with missing coordinates
  intron_data <- intron_data[!is.na(intron_data$chr) & !is.na(intron_data$start) & !is.na(intron_data$end), ]
  cat("  Intron data with coordinates:", nrow(intron_data), "rows\n")
} else if ("COORD" %in% colnames(intron_data)) {
  # Parse COORD column if chrom/start/end don't exist
  cat("  Parsing COORD column to extract coordinates\n")
  parse_coord <- function(coord_str) {
    parts <- strsplit(coord_str, ":")[[1]]
    if (length(parts) == 2) {
      chr <- parts[1]
      coords <- strsplit(parts[2], "-")[[1]]
      if (length(coords) == 2) {
        start <- as.numeric(coords[1])
        end <- as.numeric(coords[2])
        return(data.frame(chr = chr, start = start, end = end))
      }
    }
    return(data.frame(chr = NA, start = NA, end = NA))
  }

  # Apply parsing to all rows
  intron_coords <- do.call(rbind, lapply(intron_data$COORD, parse_coord))
  # Only add columns that don't already exist
  if (!"chr" %in% colnames(intron_data)) {
    intron_data$chr <- intron_coords$chr
  }
  if (!"start" %in% colnames(intron_data)) {
    intron_data$start <- intron_coords$start
  }
  if (!"end" %in% colnames(intron_data)) {
    intron_data$end <- intron_coords$end
  }

  # Remove rows with missing coordinates
  intron_data <- intron_data[!is.na(intron_data$chr) & !is.na(intron_data$start) & !is.na(intron_data$end), ]

  cat("  Intron data with coordinates:", nrow(intron_data), "rows\n")
} else {
  stop("No coordinate columns (chrom/start/end or COORD) found in intron data")
}
```

## Match BED with Intron Retention Data using GRanges

```{r match-granges}
cat("\nMatching BED coordinates with Intron Retention data using GRanges...\n")

# Create GRanges for decoy sites from BED file
decoy_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = bed_data$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = bed_data$start, end = bed_data$end),
  decoyID = bed_data$decoyID,
  strand = bed_data$strand,
  SpliceAI_score = bed_data$SpliceAI_score
)

# Create GRanges object for introns from Intron Retention data
intron_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = intron_data$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(start = intron_data$start, end = intron_data$end)
)

# Add row index to intron_data for matching
intron_data$row_idx <- seq_len(nrow(intron_data))

# Find overlaps between decoy sites and introns
overlaps <- findOverlaps(decoy_gr, intron_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)

cat("  Overlaps found:", length(overlaps), "\n")

# Get matched data - extract all columns from intron_data using subjectHits
matched_intron_data <- intron_data[subjectHits(overlaps), ]

# Add decoyID from query
matched_intron_data$decoyID <- decoy_gr$decoyID[queryHits(overlaps)]

# Calculate intron length if not already present
if (!"intron_length" %in% colnames(matched_intron_data)) {
  matched_intron_data$intron_length <- matched_intron_data$end - matched_intron_data$start
}

cat("  Decoy sites overlapping introns (before filtering):", nrow(matched_intron_data), "\n")
cat("  Unique decoys with intron overlaps:", length(unique(matched_intron_data$decoyID)), "\n")

# If a decoy overlaps multiple introns, select the one with the shortest length
matched_intron_data <- matched_intron_data %>%
  arrange(decoyID, intron_length) %>%
  distinct(decoyID, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Remove temporary row_idx column if it exists
if ("row_idx" %in% colnames(matched_intron_data)) {
  matched_intron_data$row_idx <- NULL
}

cat("  Decoy sites after selecting shortest intron:", nrow(matched_intron_data), "\n")
cat("  Unique decoys:", length(unique(matched_intron_data$decoyID)), "\n")
```

## Merge All Data

```{r merge-all-data}
cat("\nMerging all data...\n")

# Convert to data.table for merging
matched_intron_dt <- as.data.table(matched_intron_data)

# Identify overlapping column names (excluding decoyID which is the merge key)
bed_cols <- colnames(bed_data)
intron_cols <- colnames(matched_intron_dt)
overlapping_cols <- setdiff(intersect(bed_cols, intron_cols), "decoyID")

if (length(overlapping_cols) > 0) {
  cat("  Warning: Overlapping column names (will be suffixed):", paste(overlapping_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  # Rename overlapping columns in intron data with .intron suffix
  for (col in overlapping_cols) {
    setnames(matched_intron_dt, col, paste0(col, ".intron"))
  }
}

# Merge BED data with matched intron data
final_data <- merge(
  bed_data,
  matched_intron_dt,
  by = "decoyID",
  all.x = FALSE # Only keep decoys that matched introns
)

cat("  Final merged data:", nrow(final_data), "rows\n")
cat("  Columns:", ncol(final_data), "\n")
```

## Print Column Names

```{r print-column-names}
cat("\n=== Column Names ===\n")
cat(paste(colnames(final_data), collapse = "\n"), "\n")
```

## Summary

```{r summary}
cat("\n=== Summary ===\n")
cat("  Total decoy sites in BED:", nrow(bed_data), "\n")
cat("  Decoy sites matched to introns:", nrow(final_data), "\n")
cat("  Unique decoyIDs matched:", length(unique(final_data$decoyID)), "\n")
if ("EVENT" %in% colnames(final_data)) {
  cat("  Unique introns matched:", length(unique(final_data$EVENT)), "\n")
}
if ("GENE" %in% colnames(final_data)) {
  cat("  Unique genes matched:", length(unique(final_data$GENE)), "\n")
}
```

## Write Final Data to TSV

```{r write-output}
output_file <- "../results/decoy_intron_retention_merged.tsv"
fwrite(final_data, file = output_file, sep = "\t", col.names = TRUE, quote = FALSE)
cat("\nFinal data written to:", output_file, "\n")
cat("  Rows:", nrow(final_data), "\n")
cat("  Columns:", ncol(final_data), "\n")
```
